owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. New approved direction: prove the smallest legal reactive policy-pack slice so a loaded mod can react in-session through precompiled branches.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: MP export/verify/import plus SNC/tray now surface fail-closed bootstrap provenance for handoff packages; the next bounded gap is forwarding that provenance into real-session loop artifacts so compareable owner-facing outputs do not need to reopen SNC snapshot or the MP manifest.

chunks.title: Forward MP bootstrap provenance into loop
chunks.goal: Forward the new MP package bootstrap provenance fields into real-session loop stdout/brief/evidence so owner-facing follow-up artifacts can tell whether the latest handoff package is bootstrap-backed.
acceptance: Real-session loop surfaces MP provenance state/source qualities/bootstrap count from the selected package or export surface in stable machine-readable output.
Owner-facing loop artifacts no longer require reopening SNC snapshot or the MP package manifest just to inspect bootstrap provenance.
Absent provenance data remains explicit and fail-closed.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after loop bootstrap provenance
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and today's owner-facing daily summary aligned after loop/bootstrap provenance forwarding lands.
acceptance: Roadmap notes mention the shipped loop/bootstrap provenance forwarding.
The sprint queue advances to the next missing bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving the loop/bootstrap provenance chunk as the head item.
The daily freework report for 2026-06-06 is replaced, not duplicated.
